title: Devil May Craft
description: This is a modification for the game minecraft, which adds things from the series of games from the studio Capcom - Devil May Cry. The modification is still in the alpha stage of development, so if you find bugs or suggest ideas, let me know.
body:
I present to you a modification - Devil May Craft. This modification is based on the slasher game series from the Japanese studio Capcom. I am creating this mod to transfer content from this game series to Minecraft for those people who either do not have the opportunity to play them or their computer configuration is weak enough. Over time, not only new items and creatures will be added there, but also more structures, biomes, and dimensions. You can find out all the other news in our telegram channel.

[Telegram channel](https://t.me/devilmaycraft)
